title: ophrys × garnierae
intro: Ophrys × garnierae, also known as the bee orchid, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Ophrys, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. The bee orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Ophrys × garnierae include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the bee orchid can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal and external use.
